issue_title: Some html file's head element will be empty
issue_description:
Hello, Jonathan
I love Jsoup, and handling many html files.
But today, I'm under the  problem.
When parse with Jsoup, some html file's head element will be empty.
Sample html is here -> http://dl.dropbox.com/u/972460/test.html
Please help me.

method_signature.params_string: ByteBuffer byteData, String charsetName, String baseUri, Parser parser
